idea-plugin.name: Android Studio Template (Hilt + Retrofit + Room)
idea-plugin.description:
Plugin for Android Studio that integrates into the "New Project" wizard under Phone and Tablet to generate clean architecture Android projects pre-configured with:
  • Dagger Hilt (Dependency Injection)
  • Retrofit + kotlinx.serialization (Networking)
  • Room (Local Database & DAOs)
  • Clean Architecture (Data, Domain, UI with Jetpack Compose & Material3)
